title: VRF + GRE: FINANCE VRF'i Tunnel0 ile R11-R22 Arasında Uzat (R22 tarafı, Tunnel 10.11.22.0/30)
guidelines: Refer to the Tasks tab to view the tasks for this lab item.
Refer to the Topology tab to access the device console(s) and perform the tasks.
Console access is available for all required devices.
All necessary preconfigurations have been applied.
Do not change the enable password or hostname for any device.
Save your configurations to NVRAM before moving to the next item.
tasks: A colleague started configuring a new network. All configurations on R11 are complete and communication between R11 and R22 is functional. Complete the configurations on R22 for the tasks below.
Task 1: Extend the FINANCE VRF between R11 and R22 using Tunnel 0.
Task 2: Complete the FINANCE VRF configuration on R22 and configure static routing so that traffic between VLAN 111 and VLAN 222 uses Tunnel 0 exclusively.
Note: Sw22 can be used to validate traffic flow.
hints: VRF'i once interface'e ata ('ip vrf forwarding FINANCE'), SONRA IP adresini yaz — VRF atamasi mevcut IP'yi siler.
Tunnel kaynak/hedefi GLOBAL tablodadir: source e0/0, destination R11'in ISP yuzu 209.165.200.230. Tunnel0 IP'si 10.11.22.2/30.
VLAN 111'e giden trafik Tunnel'i kullansin diye next-hop tunelin karsi ucu: 10.11.22.1. VLAN 222 icin next-hop Sw22: 10.22.22.2.
answer_key_raw:
R22:
R22> enable
R22# configure terminal
R22(config)# interface Ethernet0/1
R22(config-if)# ip vrf forwarding FINANCE
R22(config-if)# ip address 10.22.22.1 255.255.255.252
R22(config-if)# no shutdown
R22(config-if)# exit
R22(config)# interface Tunnel0
R22(config-if)# ip vrf forwarding FINANCE
R22(config-if)# ip address 10.11.22.2 255.255.255.252
R22(config-if)# tunnel source Ethernet0/0
R22(config-if)# tunnel destination 209.165.200.230
R22(config-if)# no shutdown
R22(config-if)# exit
R22(config)# ip route vrf FINANCE 10.10.111.0 255.255.255.0 10.11.22.1
R22(config)# ip route vrf FINANCE 10.10.222.0 255.255.255.0 10.22.22.2
R22(config)# end
R22# write
explanation: Item 23'ün tıpatıp aynısı ama Tunnel0 IP'si 10.11.22.2/30 (R11=.1): Tunnel0 FINANCE VRF içine alınır, tünel global adresler üzerinden kurulur (source e0/0, destination 209.165.200.230). e0/1 de aynı VRF'e alınıp 10.22.22.1/30 verilir. VRF statik rotaları: VLAN111 tünelin karşı ucu üzerinden (10.11.22.1), VLAN222 Sw22 üzerinden (10.22.22.2).
